zh.Brampton, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾布藍普頓

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Makin Sr於1522年出生在英國艾可分格林時，他的父親John Maykyng24歲，母親Agnes Morse23歲。他於1547年與Katherine Sherman在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1562年3月16日在他的家鄉享年40歲，埋葬在英國艾可分格林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Makin Sr于1522年出生在英国艾可分格林时，他的父亲John Maykyng24岁，母亲Agnes Morse23岁。他于1547年与Katherine Sherman在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1562年3月16日在他的家乡享年40岁，埋葬在英国艾可分格林。

nameMeanings.name: Makin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): from the Middle English personal name Maykin, a diminutive of May , a pet form of Mayhew (see Matthew ). Compare Makinson .
English (northwestern): nickname from Middle English maide + diminutive suffix -kin ‘little maid’, perhaps used in a derogatory sense.

variants.name: May
meanings: English: from the Middle English male personal name May, a pet form of Matthew (see Mayhew ).

English, Dutch, and German: from a personal name or nickname taken from the month of May (Middle English, Old French mai, Middle High German meie, from Latin Maius (mensis), from Maia, a minor Roman goddess of fertility). This name was sometimes bestowed on someone born or baptized in the month of May; it was also used to refer to someone of a sunny disposition, or who had some anecdotal connection with the month of May, such as owing a feudal obligation then. In England, this name was possibly also a pet form of Mary or Margaret. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Denmark.

variants.name: Meakin
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire): variant of   Makin   1, 2, and 4.

variants.name: Makins
meanings: English: variant of Makin 1 and 2, with post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Mackins .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Makin Sr was born in 1522, in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, his father, John Maykyng, was 24 and his mother, Agnes Morse, was 23. He married Katherine Sherman in 1547, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 16 March 1562, in his hometown, at the age of 40, and was buried in Fingringhoe, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Makin Sr est né en 1522, à Fingringhoe, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Maykyng, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes Morse, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Sherman en 1547, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1562, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Fingringhoe, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Makin Sr 1522 in Fingringhoe, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Maykyng 24 und seine Mutter Agnes Morse 23. Er hat 1547 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Katherine Sherman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 16. März 1562 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Fingringhoe, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Makin Sr è nato il nel 1522 nel Fingringhoe, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Maykyng, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Morse, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Sherman nel 1547, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 16 marzo 1562, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Fingringhoe, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Makin Srが1522年にイギリスエセックスフィングリングhオで生まれた時，父John Maykyngは24歳，母Agnes Morseは23歳であった。1547年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでKatherine Shermanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1562年3月16日に故郷で40歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスフィングリングhオにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Makin Sr(이)가 1522년 영국 에세스 핑그링호에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Maykyng(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Morse(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1547년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Katherine Sherman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1562년 3월 16일 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 핑그링호에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Makin Sr nasceu em 1522, em Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Maykyng, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Morse, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Sherman em 1547, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 16 de março de 1562, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Makin Sr родился в 1522 г. в местности фингрингхо, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Maykyng было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Morse, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Sherman в 1547 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 16 марта 1562 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности фингрингхо, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Makin Sr nació en 1522, en Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Maykyng, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Agnes Morse, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Katherine Sherman en 1547, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1562, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra.
